description_long: This water cooler features a tall, rectangular cabinet with a dark, wood-like exterior and a prominent front dispensing area. The upper section displays a translucent panel with faint text, possibly indicating beverage options or branding, above four circular dispensing taps arranged in a row. Below the taps, a drip tray is integrated to catch spills, and the lower half consists of horizontal slats or vents, likely for ventilation or storage. The sides are solid and unadorned, emphasizing the functional front. The back is flat and featureless, suggesting it is designed to be placed against a wall in public or office environments.
description: A tall, dark water cooler with four front dispensing taps, a drip tray, and a vented lower section. The upper panel displays faint text or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing four circular dispensing taps, a drip tray, a translucent upper panel with text, and a vented lower section.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the cabinet and the protruding dispensing area, with no visible controls or features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat, featureless back panel with horizontal striping, likely for structural support.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the depth and the protruding dispensing area.
attribute_control_panel_design: Upper front panel with faint text, no visible buttons or switches; dispensing area features four push-button taps.
attribute_brand_logo: faint text on upper panel, possibly a brand or label, but not clearly legible
